prompt: Transform the uploaded photo into a cute childlike crayon drawing while keeping the original pose, composition, clothing, expressions, and background. Use colorful wax-crayon and colored-pencil textures, messy scribbles, shaky outlines, and uneven coloring on textured paper. Simplify the faces into adorable cartoon-style characters with big eyes and rosy cheeks. Keep the mountains, lake, trees, clouds, and sky in a playful hand-drawn style. Add a small rounded-corner reference photo inset in the bottom-right corner showing the original image, with a white border and subtle shadow. Vibrant colors, charming, funny, handmade, high-detail crayon artwork.
